title: Inbox
subtitle: Everything you've captured. Tap to preview.
empty: Nothing captured yet. Tap Capture to add your first.
briefError: Couldn't create the summary and questions
cannotDeleteBody: Promoted sources need the wiki page deleted first.
deleteConfirmBody: The attached body file can remain on your account. The inbox item will be removed.

firstCaptureHint: Opens capture to save your first source.
